name: FAI_WORKFLOW_EXECUTIONS
description: This table will store workflow agent execution details in each workflow step.

columns.Name: WORKFLOW_EXECUTION_ID
columns.Comments: The system generated primary key.

columns.Name: WORKFLOW_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key referencing to FAI_WORKFLOWS table.

columns.Name: EXECUTION_GROUP_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Collection of workflow execution steps grouped within one workflow execution.

columns.Name: TRACE
columns.Comments: Execution traceId captured at runtime.

columns.Name: TYPE
columns.Comments: This field will capture type of execution.

columns.Name: STEP
columns.Comments: This field will store Workflow step of this execution.

columns.Name: AGENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key reference to HR_GEN_AI_AGENTS table.

columns.Name: OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: The user identification who executes the Workflow.

columns.Name: EXECUTION_DETAILS
columns.Comments: This field will store details of step execution.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: EXECUTION_TIME
columns.Comments: Time taken to execute the step

columns.Name: LLM_REQ_INPUT_TOKEN_CNT
columns.Comments: Token count for  LLM input

columns.Name: LLM_OUTPUT_TOKEN_CNT
columns.Comments: Token count for LLM output

columns.Name: SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of invocation. Can be Admin/Eval/End_User etc.,

columns.Name: TRIGGER_TYPE
columns.Comments: Conversation was triggered by Email/Webhook etc.,

columns.Name: WORKFLOW_CODE
columns.Comments: Workflow Code referencing to FAI_WORKFLOWS table.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Workflow Status referencing to FAI_WORKFLOWS table.

columns.Name: VERSION
columns.Comments: Workflow Version referencing to FAI_WORKFLOWS table.

columns.Name: APPLICATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the code of the application
